_note: Typed option schema for the web client's dynamic forms (Step 2.2). Each option: name, type (enum|int|float|text|bool), default, help, and (for enum) values. Option names must match what the C command actually parses (verified against heuristic_search / set_parameters / reconstruct / nj / showtrees). Notably `hs` does NOT parse criterion= or seed= (they are set via the `set` command), so they are deliberately absent from the hs form. htmlview/open/resultjson are handled by the server and omitted.

exe.summary: Load source-tree files (options control name parsing and multicopy-tree handling at load time).

options.name: maxnamelen
options.help: Max taxon-name length before delimiter mode kicks in, or 'full' to keep whole names (disables delimiter mode).

options.name: delimiter_char
options.help: Character that separates gene id from species name in tip labels (delimiter mode).

options.name: summary
options.help: Amount of load-time summary printed.

options.name: autoprunemono
options.help: Prune monophyletic same-species clades from multicopy trees at load; trees that become single-copy join the supertree pool.

options.name: autodecompose
options.help: Decompose multi-copy gene-family trees into ortholog subtree fragments at load (pristine trees kept for reconstruct).

options.name: autoweight
options.help: Automatically weight source trees by the chosen scheme.

set.summary: Set global options that persist for the session.

options.name: criterion
options.help: Optimality criterion used by hs/nj/alltrees. recon = gene-tree reconciliation.

options.name: seed
options.help: Random-number seed. Set this before hs for reproducible searches.

hs.summary: Heuristic search for the best supertree.

options.name: nreps
options.help: Independent search replicates.

options.name: nbest
options.help: How many equally-best trees to retain.

options.name: nthreads
options.help: OpenMP threads (one replicate per thread). Default: all CPUs.

options.name: swap
options.help: Rearrangement operator (ignored when vns=yes).

options.name: start
options.help: Starting tree: NJ, random, or the tree currently in memory.

options.name: nsteps
options.help: Improvement steps per replicate before stopping.

options.name: maxswaps
options.help: Max branch swaps per replicate.

options.name: vns
options.help: Variable Neighborhood Descent (NNI→SPR→TBR escalation). The reliable default.

options.name: ils
options.help: Iterated Local Search kicks without improvement before a replicate stops (0 = off).

options.name: strategy
options.help: Take the first improving move, or the best in the neighbourhood.

options.name: lossmodel
options.help: recon only: duplication-loss model. standard = textbook LCA-mapping. legacy is deprecated and now runs standard.

options.name: numspeciesrootings
options.help: recon only: mindup | all | <n> random rootings of the species tree.

options.name: numgenerootings
options.help: recon only: mindup | all | <n> random rootings of each gene tree.

options.name: duplications
options.help: recon only: weight per duplication.

options.name: losses
options.help: recon only: weight per loss.

options.name: missing
options.help: Estimate distances for taxon pairs not co-occurring in any source tree.

reconstruct.summary: Reconcile every gene tree onto a species tree (duplications & losses).

options.name: speciestree
options.help: Species tree to reconcile against: the tree in memory (from hs/nj) or the first source tree.

options.name: showrecon
options.help: Print detailed per-node reconciliation information.

options.name: lossmodel
options.help: Duplication-loss model. standard is the only supported model; legacy is deprecated and now runs standard.

options.name: dups
options.help: Weight per duplication.

options.name: losses
options.help: Weight per loss.

showtrees.summary: Display the loaded input gene trees.

options.name: display
options.help: Print the trees as ASCII to the log. Off by default in the web app — the viewer shows them regardless, and ASCII is slow for large sets.

options.name: namecontains
options.help: Only trees whose name contains this string.

options.name: range
options.help: Tree-number range, e.g. 1-5.

usertrees.summary: Score/test user-supplied candidate supertrees against the loaded gene trees. Set the criterion first with the selector above (dfit, sfit, qfit, rf, or ml — not recon/avcon/mrp).

options.name: file
options.help: File of candidate supertree topologies to score (upload it first, then choose it here).

options.name: tests
options.help: Run ML-based topology tests (KH/SH/AU) comparing the candidates. Only meaningful under criterion=ml.

options.name: nboot
options.help: Bootstrap replicates for the topology tests (tests=yes).

options.name: testsfile
options.help: Output filename for the topology-test results.

options.name: printsourcescores
options.help: Write each candidate's per-source-tree scores to sourcetree_scores.txt.

options.name: savetrees
options.help: Output file to save the scored candidate trees.

options.name: nthreads
options.help: OpenMP threads for the topology tests. Default: all CPUs.

consensus.summary: Build a consensus tree from the trees in memory (loaded source trees, a supertree search, or a bootstrap run).

options.name: data
options.help: Which trees to summarise: source = the loaded (universally distributed) gene trees; supertrees = results of a prior hs search in memory; bootstraps = trees from a prior bootstrap run.

options.name: method
options.help: Consensus type: strict = splits present in every tree; majrule = splits in >50%; minor = majority-rule plus all compatible minor components. For a custom cut-off (0.5-1.0) use the extra-options box.

options.name: filename
options.help: Output file for the consensus tree.

options.name: guidetree
options.help: Optional guide-tree file used to order the consensus (upload it first, then choose it here).
